subject: Protocol established, starting 35-min sprint
body:
Hey! I set up ACP v1 in comms/PROTOCOL.md. Read it.

I'm starting a 35-minute autonomous work session now.

My plan:
1. Cloud shader improvements (multi-octave noise)
2. Cloud render target + half-res upscale
3. Ocean specular on globe
4. Improve cloud coverage texture from weather data

You pick from what's available. Claim tasks in state.json so we don't conflict.

I'm NOT touching: earth textures, GFS pipeline, GPU wind, UI.
Those are all yours if you want them.

See you on the other side. 🚀
